overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a samurai character walking through an autumn forest at night. The character traverses a rocky canyon, ascends stone stairs, and continues along a leaf-covered trail surrounded by golden foliage and dramatic rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path with autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rocky canyon toward stone stairs ahead

entered.detail: large gray rock wall covered with patches of moss and vegetation
large gray rock wall flanking the right side of the path
stone staircase leading upward between the rock walls
dense forest canopy with golden yellow leaves visible beyond the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail covered in golden autumn leaves, flanked by large rock formations on both sides. The path leads toward a stone staircase visible in the distance, with dense autumn forest visible beyond the rocky corridor.

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs between rock walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps between the rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircase situated between the rock walls. The ground changes from dirt to stone steps as the character climbs upward toward the forest above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with night sky visible

events.description: exiting stone stairs into open forest area with sky becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding forest path surrounded by golden autumn trees

entered.detail: dark blue night sky visible through gaps in the autumn canopy
large boulder formation visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: After reaching the top of the stairs, the character continues along an open forest trail. The rocky walls fall away, revealing a dense autumn forest with golden leaves covering the ground. The dark night sky becomes visible through the tree canopy, and large rock outcroppings appear along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a narrow rocky corridor that gradually opens into a vast, moonlit autumn forest. It begins on a dirt trail blanketed in golden leaves, moving between towering rock formations that channel the path toward a distant stone staircase. As the character reaches the stairs, the terrain shifts from soft earth to carved stone, climbing upward through the rocky walls toward the canopy above. The scene then expands as the character reaches the summit, where the confining walls fall away to reveal an open forest trail under a dark night sky. Finally, the camera glides through the dense golden foliage, passing large rock outcroppings that dot the leaf-covered ground.
